title: Xtra Silky Saudi Arabian Amazake Onigiri
description: A quick-fix Saudi Arabian dish featuring amazake and nigiri-shaping, this vegetarian-friendly recipe combines herbal notes with a silky texture. It is a unique fusion of Japanese and Saudi Arabian flavors.
instructions: Rinse the sushi rice thoroughly and soak it in water for 30 minutes.
Combine the amazake, sesame oil, salt, black pepper, dried parsley, and dried mint in a saucepan and heat over low heat.
Add the soaked sushi rice to the saucepan and stir well to combine.
Cook the mixture over low heat for 15 minutes, stirring constantly.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool to room temperature.
Once the mixture has cooled, shape it into small triangular onigiri shapes.
Serve the onigiri immediately, garnished with additional parsley and mint if desired.
